center.name: Niels Krabbe
center.summary: Niels Krabbe是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Ruddy pigeon、Jocotoco antpitta，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: {{speciesbox | name = Jocotoco antpitta | image=Grallaria ridgelyi -Tapichalaca Reserve, Ecuador-8.jpg | image_caption=In Tapichalaca Reserve, Ecuador | status = EN | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Grallaria | species = ridgelyi | authority = Krabbe, Agro, Rice, Jacome, Navarrete & Sornoza, 1999 | range_map = Jocotoco_Antpitta_range.png | range_map_caption = Known Ecuadorian range in blue

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In South America it occurs in the canopy of humid forest from near sea-level to 1500 m (5000 ft) ASL, occasionally higher; exceptionally, they may range up to 3000 m ASL or more.Krabbe, Niels; Flórez, Pablo; Suárez, Gustavo; Castaño, José; Arango, Juan David & Duque, Arley (2006) The birds of Páramo de Frontino, western Andes of Colombia
